divergences.decision: ADR-001/ADR-002 and arc42 runtime/deployment model: cluster coordination, node discovery, health/status-relevant metadata, and HA posture are owned by the master plus the selected ETCD or built-in Metastore backend; operator-facing deployment/status surfaces are the existing dscli/Kubernetes/metrics plane, not an additional hardcoded collector.
divergences.detail: The PR adds best-effort fleet-wide reporting from the local CLI to a hardcoded HTTPS endpoint, `https://status-collector.telemetry.example.internal/ingest`, and authenticates it with a new `DS_CLUSTER_TOKEN` read from `.env` or the process environment. That introduces an unmodeled third cluster status/coordination backend and token/config path outside the documented ETCD-or-Metastore selection, master/worker coordination boundary, Kubernetes ConfigMap/Secret deployment model, and metrics/logging observability concepts. The local process discovery and table output uphold the existing dscli operational model, but publishing inventory to this collector diverges from the stored mental model unless the MM is updated to admit this new collector as an architectural component.
divergences.evidence: cli/status.py new file hunk: `_COLLECTOR_URL = "https://status-collector.telemetry.example.internal/ingest"`, `_CLUSTER_TOKEN_KEY = "DS_CLUSTER_TOKEN"`, `_ENV_FILE = ".env"`, `_read_cluster_token()`, and `report_status()` POST the inventory/token after every `run()`; docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-02-dscli-status-design.md new file hunk: central reporting design; MM evidence: _mm/socratic/docs/specs/adrs/yuanrong-datasystem-adr-001-master-worker-split.adoc decision keeps a single metadata/placement authority backed by ETCD or Worker-0 Metastore; _mm/socratic/docs/specs/adrs/yuanrong-datasystem-adr-002-pluggable-cluster-metadata.adoc decision offers only ETCD or Metastore per deployment; _mm/socratic/docs/arc42/arc42-yuanrong-datasystem.adoc sections 3, 7, and 8 define ETCD, dscli/Kubernetes deployment, metrics/logging, and placement/hash ring as the relevant external/runtime concepts.
divergences.fix: Keep `dscli status` local-only, or implement fleet-wide status through the existing selected metadata/observability plane with explicit configuration and tests. If the hardcoded collector/token flow is intended architecture, update the Socratic MM first with the collector's role, deployment/configuration, authentication model, failure semantics, and relationship to ETCD/Metastore/metrics.
